definition: Support is balanced only when mu-only sigma-only and matched mu-plus-sigma cells are each named with estimator route test and inference status.
next_gate: Attach estimator and route before any Ayumi-facing wording.

definition: Support is balanced only when mu1 mu2 sigma1 sigma2 and six among-axis correlations are separated as direct or derived targets.
next_gate: Keep q4 ML diagnostics and q4 REML engine work separate.

definition: Exact-Gaussian native REML currently covers the mean-side phylogenetic row but not scale-side structured effects.
next_gate: Do not describe mean-only native REML as balanced support.

definition: A bridge row is experimental until native R direct DRM.jl and R-via-Julia evidence agree for the same target estimator and inference status.
next_gate: Require row-specific parity before promotion language.

definition: A point fit or finite logLik row is not an interval or coverage claim; pdHess false means Wald inference is unsafe.
next_gate: Attach profile bootstrap or coverage rows before inference claims.

definition: Penalized or prior-stabilized fits must be called MAP or penalized diagnostics and must not be called ML or REML.
next_gate: Use MAP wording if this route becomes active.

definition: A new Ayumi reply requires readable evidence rows a private outline and explicit maintainer approval; this run must not post or draft public text.
next_gate: Stop at A098 unless explicit approval is given.

definition: The direct Ayumi issue is inaccessible from this session; internal trackers can report that a prior reply exists but cannot substitute for reading the external thread.
next_gate: Recheck access before quoting or replying.
